entries.explanation: Habitual actions don't take 了
Don't use 很 with 比 comparisons
Use 过 alone for experience; don't combine 了过
每天 indicates habitual action; 在 marks ongoing action right now
有 takes the object after it: 我有很多朋友
Past actions use 没, not 不. 不 is for habitual/future negation

entries.wrong: 他给了我一个很好建议。
entries.correct: 他给了我一个很好的建议。
entries.explanation: Adjective + 的 + noun: 很好的建议
This sentence is correct — time word after 想 is fine
Don't combine 更 (more) with 最 (most); use one or the other

entries.wrong: 虽然他很忙，他还是来了。
entries.correct: 虽然他很忙，但是他还是来了。
entries.explanation: 虽然...但是 is a pair; 但是 (or 但/可是) is required in the second clause
Time words (昨天) go before the verb phrase, not after 了
Result complement (完) comes right after verb, 了 follows: 看完了
Duration goes between verb and object: V + duration + object
In degree complements, 很 precedes the adjective: 得很快
也 goes before the negation: 也不喜欢

entries.wrong: 因为下雨，我没去公园。所以
entries.correct: 因为下雨，所以我没去公园。
entries.explanation: 因为...所以 pair: 所以 starts the second clause
把 sentences need a complement or 了 after the verb; bare verb is incomplete
被 comes before the agent: 被我看完了

entries.wrong: 老师让学生们不要大声说话了。
entries.correct: 老师让学生们不要大声说话了。
entries.explanation: This sentence is correct — 让 + person + 不要 is valid

entries.wrong: 除了他以外，我们都不去过那里。
entries.correct: 除了他以外，我们都没去过那里。
entries.explanation: Negate 过 (experience) with 没, not 不

entries.wrong: 我一边唱歌一边跳舞了。
entries.explanation: 一边...一边 describes simultaneous actions; 了 is not needed here

entries.wrong: 你能不能告诉我哪里是银行？
entries.correct: 你能不能告诉我银行在哪里？
entries.explanation: Indirect question keeps statement order: 银行在哪里
起床 is a word; you can't insert 来 in the middle of it here
Object goes before verb in V得 constructions: 中文说得很流利
This sentence is correct — 长长的 is valid adjective reduplication
